name: Pasta Fagioli (Pasta with Beans)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the macaroni according to package instructions until al dente. Drain and set aside.
2. In a heavy gauge saucepot or Dutch oven, melt butter over medium heat. Add the chopped onion and cook until transparent.
3. Stir in the garlic and cook for an additional minute.
4. Add the crushed tomatoes, beans (including juices), parsley, and black pepper. Bring to a boil.
5. Reduce heat and stir in the cooked macaroni. Simmer for about 20 minutes, stirring frequently. If needed, add reserved pasta water to prevent sticking.
6. Season with additional salt if necessary.
7. Serve hot, garnished with grated Parmesan or Romano cheese. Optional: Add shredded cheddar cheese on top before serving.
